name: ASAP6.1
description: ASAP6.1 is a positively tuned ASAP variant engineered by structure-guided saturation mutagenesis at VSD residues F413 and Q414, yielding the largest relative ΔF/F per action potential among ASAP6 variants. It exhibits mono-exponential kinetics (τ_on 3.99 ms, τ_off 4.89 ms at room temperature), with 50% ΔF/F for AP-like waveforms (2 ms FWHM) in HEK293 cells. ASAP6.1 successfully reports spikes from layer 2/3 pyramidal neurons in awake behaving mice by one-photon widefield microscopy (SNR = 14, 500 Hz). It is optimized for extended-duration spike detection in densely labeled neuronal populations.
